headline: Assessing Dell Technologies (DELL) Valuation After Strong Multi Year Shareholder Returns
summary: Why Dell Technologies (DELL) is on investors’ radar Dell Technologies (DELL) has attracted fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock closing at US$174.37 and posting a 1 day return of about 3%. That move caps a month with a 20.1% gain. See our latest analysis for Dell Technologies. Zooming out, the recent 1 month share price return of 20.1% and year to date gain of 36.4% come on top of a very large 3 year total shareholder return, which points to strong momentum rather than a one...

headline: Dell Lands London Stock Exchange Cloud Role With Long-Term Investor Implications
summary: London Stock Exchange Group has entered a multi-year partnership with Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) to build a private cloud platform. The platform is intended to support LSEG's critical data, analytics, and markets operations with secure, high-performance on-premises infrastructure. The agreement focuses on hybrid and multi-cloud use cases for a highly regulated financial institution. For you as an investor, this partnership highlights NYSE:DELL as a key supplier of on-premises...

headline: Dell’s CFO built a 27-year career without leaving the company. Here’s how he kept moving up
summary: David Kennedy went from Dell intern to CFO.
